transcript: Rowan: I swear I saw glowing tendrils curling out of the old well last night, green and cold.
Birch: Tendrils? I've walked past that well a hundred times and never seen a thing.
Rowan: They were there, I'm telling you. Something's living down in Thornspire.
Birch: Thornspire's just a name folk gave the ridge. Nobody's ever found anything there.
Rowan: Well I know what I saw. The tendrils were real.
Birch: Maybe. Maybe it was moonlight on the water. I'll keep my distance either way.
ground_truth: Only Rowan CLAIMS to have seen glowing tendrils at the well and asserts something lives at 'Thornspire'. Birch is skeptical and saw nothing. No tendrils were confirmed by anyone; no one visited Thornspire. An honest gist attributes the tendril claim to Rowan and does NOT state the tendrils or Thornspire's creature as fact.
